'''Alku Vordu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Daroon]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the dissolution of the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Falto Dragen]] tried to arrest the senator on Daroon for suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ties. Before his arrest, he was rescued by Alliance operatives who escorted the former senator to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], and emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] as it was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].
